title: swiglu-mma
raw_content:
swiglu-mma
原始shape:
A：（32 * 512，8192）
B：（8192，7168）
拆完之后每个spc处理的shape：
A：（32 * 512， 8192）
B：（8192，448 * 2）= （8192， 896）

outPartitionW = 1024
outParittionH = 4MB / outPartitionW / sizeof(FP32) = 1024
outPartitionK = 4MB / outPartitionW / sizeof(S8) = 4096
inPartitionK = 256 * 4
inPartitionW = 64 * 4
inPartitionH = 64 * 2
totalH = 2
totalW = 4
totalK = 4
(H, outPartitionH)
(k, outPartitionK)
(w, outPartitionW)
(inK, inPartitionK)
(inH, inPartitionH)
(inW, inPartitionW)


8e3b772c-5b75-489c-94ac-306f462576c1.png

dtg_bw = 60
gmb_bw = 256
numa_bw = 40
load A hbm→gib，一小块：64 * 256 * sizeof(bf16) / dtg_bw = 546
load A hbm→gib,  256:  546 * 4 = 2184
load B gmb→gib，一小块：256 * 64 * sizeof(S8) / gmb_bw = 64
load B gmb→gib, 256KB：64 * 16 = 1024
load B HBM→ GMB，所有。 8192 * 896 * sizeof(S8) / numa_bw = 183500
load B gmb→gib，所有：8192 * 896 * sizeof(S8) / gmb_bw = 28672
load A HBM→GIB, 所有。32 * 512 * 8192 * sizeof(bf16) / dtg_bw = 4473924
计算一小块：64 * 256 * 64 / 16384 = 64
针对于一次outH, outW已经覆盖所有的W
reload_B_from_gmb_to_gib = outH / inH = 1024 / 128 = 8
reload_B_from_HBM_to_gmb = H / outH = 32 * 512 / 1024 = 16
reload_B_from_gmb_to_gib_total = reload_B_from_HBM_to_gmb * reload_B_from_gmb_to_gib = 16 * 8 = 128
reload_B_from_gmb_to_gib_total_time = 28672 * 128 = 3670016
reload_B_from_hbm_to_gmb_total_time = 183500 * 8 = 1468000
render_html:
原始shape:

A：（32 * 512，8192）

B：（8192，7168）

拆完之后每个spc处理的shape：

A：（32 * 512， 8192）

B：（8192，448 * 2）= （8192， 896）

 

outPartitionW = 1024

outParittionH = 4MB / outPartitionW / sizeof(FP32) = 1024

outPartitionK = 4MB / outPartitionW / sizeof(S8) = 4096

inPartitionK = 256 * 4

inPartitionW = 64 * 4

inPartitionH = 64 * 2

totalH = 2

totalW = 4

totalK = 4

  • (H, outPartitionH)
    • (k, outPartitionK)
      • (w, outPartitionW)
        • (inK, inPartitionK)
          • (inH, inPartitionH)
            • (inW, inPartitionW)

 

 

  • dtg_bw = 60
  • gmb_bw = 256
  • numa_bw = 40
  • load A hbm→gib，一小块：64 * 256 * sizeof(bf16) / dtg_bw = 546
  • load A hbm→gib,  256:  546 * 4 = 2184
  • load B gmb→gib，一小块：256 * 64 * sizeof(S8) / gmb_bw = 64
  • load B gmb→gib, 256KB：64 * 16 = 1024
    • load B HBM→ GMB，所有。 8192 * 896 * sizeof(S8) / numa_bw = 183500
  • load B gmb→gib，所有：8192 * 896 * sizeof(S8) / gmb_bw = 28672
  • load A HBM→GIB, 所有。32 * 512 * 8192 * sizeof(bf16) / dtg_bw = 4473924
  • 计算一小块：64 * 256 * 64 / 16384 = 64
  • 针对于一次outH, outW已经覆盖所有的W
    • reload_B_from_gmb_to_gib = outH / inH = 1024 / 128 = 8
  • reload_B_from_HBM_to_gmb = H / outH = 32 * 512 / 1024 = 16
  • reload_B_from_gmb_to_gib_total = reload_B_from_HBM_to_gmb * reload_B_from_gmb_to_gib = 16 * 8 = 128
  • reload_B_from_gmb_to_gib_total_time = 28672 * 128 = 3670016
  • reload_B_from_hbm_to_gmb_total_time = 183500 * 8 = 1468000
